nl: Show the largest sale order by amount.

trials.pred_sql:
SELECT so.id, so.name, so.amount_total, rp.name AS customer
FROM sale_order so
JOIN res_partner rp ON rp.id = so.partner_id
WHERE so.state IN ('sale', 'done')
ORDER BY so.amount_total DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
  so.id,
  so.partner_id,
  so.create_uid,
  COALESCE(SUM(sol.price_subtotal), 0) as total_amount
FROM sale_order so
LEFT JOIN sale_order_line sol ON so.id = sol.order_id
GROUP BY so.id, so.partner_id, so.create_uid
ORDER BY total_amount DESC
LIMIT 1;

nl: Count the pickings per warehouse.

trials.pred_sql:
SELECT w.id, w.name AS warehouse, COUNT(DISTINCT sp.id) AS picking_count
FROM stock_warehouse w
LEFT JOIN stock_location sl ON sl.warehouse_id = w.id
LEFT JOIN stock_move sm ON sm.location_id = sl.id OR sm.location_dest_id = sl.id
LEFT JOIN stock_move_line sml ON sml.move_id = sm.id
LEFT JOIN stock_move sp ON sp.picking_id IS NOT NULL AND (sp.location_id = sl.id OR sp.location_dest_id = sl.id)
GROUP BY w.id, w.name
ORDER BY w.id;

SELECT
  sw.id,
  COUNT(DISTINCT sm.picking_id) AS picking_count
FROM stock_warehouse sw
LEFT JOIN stock_move sm ON sw.id = sm.warehouse_id
GROUP BY sw.id
ORDER BY sw.id;

nl: Compare total revenue and order count by customer this year.

trials.pred_sql:
WITH customer_metrics AS (
  SELECT
    so.partner_id,
    COUNT(DISTINCT so.id) AS order_count,
    COALESCE(SUM(sol.price_subtotal), 0) AS total_revenue
  FROM sale_order so
  LEFT JOIN sale_order_line sol ON so.id = sol.order_id
  WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM so.create_date) = EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE)
  GROUP BY so.partner_id
)
SELECT
  partner_id,
  order_count,
  total_revenue
FROM customer_metrics
ORDER BY total_revenue DESC;

nl: List products with both their on-hand quantity and total units sold this year.

trials.pred_sql:
WITH product_qty AS (
  SELECT 
    product_tmpl_id,
    new_quantity
  FROM stock_change_product_qty
  ORDER BY create_date DESC
  LIMIT 1
),
sales_this_year AS (
  SELECT 
    sol.product_id,
    SUM(sol.qty_delivered) as total_units_sold
  FROM sale_order_line sol
  WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM sol.create_date) = EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE)
    AND sol.state IN ('sale', 'done')
  GROUP BY sol.product_id
)
SELECT 
  pt.id,
  pt.name,
  pt.default_code,
  COALESCE(pq.new_quantity, 0) as on_hand_quantity,
  COALESCE(sty.total_units_sold, 0) as total_units_sold_this_year
FROM product_template pt
LEFT JOIN product_qty pq ON pt.id = pq.product_tmpl_id
LEFT JOIN sales_this_year sty ON pt.id = sty.product_id
WHERE pq.new_quantity IS NOT NULL OR sty.total_units_sold IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY pt.id;

nl: Show purchase order total value by supplier for orders confirmed this year.

trials.pred_sql:
SELECT rp.name AS supplier, SUM(po.amount_total) AS total_value
FROM purchase_order po
JOIN res_partner rp ON rp.id = po.partner_id
WHERE po.state IN ('purchase', 'done')
  AND po.date_order >= DATE '2026-01-01'
  AND po.date_order < DATE '2027-01-01'
GROUP BY rp.name
ORDER BY total_value DESC;

WITH confirmed_orders AS (
  SELECT 
    po.id,
    po.partner_id,
    po.create_date
  FROM purchase_order po
  WHERE po.state = 'purchase'
    AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM po.create_date) = EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE)
),
order_totals AS (
  SELECT 
    co.partner_id,
    SUM(pol.product_qty * pol.price_unit * (1 - pol.discount / 100)) AS total_value
  FROM confirmed_orders co
  JOIN purchase_order_line pol ON co.id = pol.order_id
  WHERE pol.display_type IS NULL OR pol.display_type != 'line_section'
  GROUP BY co.partner_id
)
SELECT 
  rp.name AS supplier,
  ot.total_value
FROM order_totals ot
JOIN res_partner rp ON ot.partner_id = rp.id
ORDER BY ot.total_value DESC;

nl: List products with both incoming and outgoing move volume this year.

trials.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT pp.id, pt.name->>'en_US' AS product
FROM stock_move sm
JOIN product_product pp ON pp.id = sm.product_id
JOIN product_template pt ON pt.id = pp.product_tmpl_id
WHERE sm.date >= DATE '2026-01-01' AND sm.date < DATE '2027-01-01'
GROUP BY pp.id, pt.name
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN sm.location_id != sm.location_dest_id AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM stock_location sl WHERE sl.id = sm.location_id AND sl.usage = 'internal') AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM stock_location sl WHERE sl.id = sm.location_dest_id AND sl.usage = 'internal') THEN 1 END) > 0
AND COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN sm.location_id != sm.location_dest_id AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM stock_location sl WHERE sl.id = sm.location_id AND sl.usage = 'internal') AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM stock_location sl WHERE sl.id = sm.location_dest_id AND sl.usage = 'internal') THEN 1 END) > 0
ORDER BY pt.name;
trials.error: for SELECT DISTINCT, ORDER BY expressions must appear in select list

trials.pred_sql:
WITH move_data AS (
  SELECT 
    sm.product_id,
    CASE 
      WHEN sm.location_id != sm.location_dest_id THEN 
        CASE 
          WHEN sm.location_id IS NOT NULL THEN 'outgoing'
          WHEN sm.location_dest_id IS NOT NULL THEN 'incoming'
        END
    END AS move_type,
    pp.default_code,
    pt.name
  FROM stock_move sm
  JOIN product_product pp ON sm.product_id = pp.id
  JOIN product_template pt ON pp.product_tmpl_id = pt.id
  WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM sm.create_date) = EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE)
    AND sm.state = 'done'
),
incoming_products AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT product_id
  FROM move_data
  WHERE move_type = 'incoming'
),
outgoing_products AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT product_id
  FROM move_data
  WHERE move_type = 'outgoing'
)
SELECT DISTINCT
  pp.id,
  pp.default_code,
  pt.name
FROM product_product pp
JOIN product_template pt ON pp.product_tmpl_id = pt.id
WHERE pp.id IN (SELECT product_id FROM incoming_products)
  AND pp.id IN (SELECT product_id FROM outgoing_products)
ORDER BY pp.default_code;

nl: Show monthly revenue trend for this year.

trials.pred_sql: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', am.date)::date AS month, SUM(aml.credit - aml.debit) AS revenue FROM account_move_line aml JOIN account_account aa ON aa.id = aml.account_id JOIN account_move am ON am.id = aml.move_id WHERE aa.account_type = 'income' AND am.state = 'posted' AND am.date >= DATE '2026-01-01' AND am.date < DATE '2027-01-01' GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', am.date) ORDER BY month;

WITH monthly_revenue AS (
  SELECT 
    DATE_TRUNC('month', am.date)::date AS month,
    SUM(CASE WHEN aml.debit > 0 THEN aml.debit ELSE 0 END) AS revenue
  FROM account_move am
  JOIN account_move_line aml ON am.id = aml.move_id
  WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM am.date) = EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE)
    AND am.state = 'posted'
  GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', am.date)
)
SELECT 
  month,
  revenue
FROM monthly_revenue
ORDER BY month;
trials.error: final-err: column am.debit does not exist

nl: How many sale orders confirmed last 90 days got delivered?

trials.pred_sql:
SELECT COUNT(so.id) AS confirmed_orders
FROM sale_order so
WHERE so.state IN ('sale', 'done')
  AND so.date_order >= DATE '2026-02-26'
  AND so.date_order < DATE '2026-05-28';

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT sol.order_id) as delivered_orders
FROM sale_order_line sol
WHERE sol.state = 'done'
  AND sol.create_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '90 days'
  AND sol.qty_delivered_method IS NOT NULL;

nl: Show inventory valuation by product category.

trials.pred_sql:
SELECT pc.complete_name AS category, SUM(svl.value) AS inventory_valuation
FROM stock_valuation_layer svl
JOIN product_template pt ON pt.id = svl.product_id
JOIN product_category pc ON pc.id = pt.categ_id
GROUP BY pc.complete_name
ORDER BY inventory_valuation DESC;

SELECT
  pc.id,
  pc.name AS category_name,
  pc.complete_name,
  COUNT(DISTINCT svl.product_id) AS product_count,
  SUM(svl.quantity) AS total_quantity,
  SUM(svl.value) AS total_value
FROM
  stock_valuation_layer svl
  INNER JOIN product_category pc ON svl.categ_id = pc.id
GROUP BY
  pc.id,
  pc.name,
  pc.complete_name
ORDER BY
  pc.complete_name;

nl: Show top 10 products by units sold this year.

trials.pred_sql:
SELECT pt.name->>'en_US' AS product, SUM(sol.product_uom_qty) AS units_sold
FROM sale_order_line sol
JOIN sale_order so ON so.id = sol.order_id
JOIN product_product pp ON pp.id = sol.product_id
JOIN product_template pt ON pt.id = pp.product_tmpl_id
WHERE so.state IN ('sale', 'done')
  AND so.date_order >= DATE '2026-01-01' AND so.date_order < DATE '2027-01-01'
GROUP BY pt.name
ORDER BY units_sold DESC
LIMIT 10;

WITH yearly_sales AS (
  SELECT 
    sm.product_id,
    SUM(sm.quantity) as total_quantity
  FROM stock_move sm
  WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM sm.date) = EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE)
    AND sm.state = 'done'
    AND sm.location_dest_id IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY sm.product_id
)
SELECT 
  pt.id,
  pt.name->>'en_US' as product_name,
  pt.default_code,
  ys.total_quantity
FROM yearly_sales ys
JOIN product_template pt ON ys.product_id = pt.id
ORDER BY ys.total_quantity DESC
LIMIT 10;

nl: Compare confirmed sales versus invoiced revenue this year.

trials.error: By 'sales', do you mean "confirmed sale orders (sale_order)", "invoiced revenue (account_move_line)", "point-of-sale receipts (pos_order)"? Please clarify so I can route the query to the right special

trials.pred_sql:
WITH confirmed_sales AS (
  SELECT 
    COALESCE(SUM(sol.price_subtotal), 0) as confirmed_sales_amount
  FROM sale_order_line sol
  WHERE sol.state = 'sale'
    AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM sol.create_date) = EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE)
),
invoiced_revenue AS (
  SELECT 
    COALESCE(SUM(sol.price_subtotal), 0) as invoiced_revenue_amount
  FROM sale_order_line sol
  WHERE sol.invoice_status = 'invoiced'
    AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM sol.create_date) = EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE)
)
SELECT 
  cs.confirmed_sales_amount,
  ir.invoiced_revenue_amount,
  (ir.invoiced_revenue_amount - cs.confirmed_sales_amount) as difference
FROM confirmed_sales cs, invoiced_revenue ir;

nl: Show this month's total sales and number of unique customers.

trials.error: By 'sales', do you mean "confirmed sale orders (sale_order)", "invoiced revenue (account_move_line)", "point-of-sale receipts (pos_order)"? Please clarify so I can route the query to the right special

trials.pred_sql:
WITH this_month_sales AS (

    so.partner_id,
    SUM(COALESCE(sol.price_subtotal, 0)) as total_sales

nl: Show year-to-date sales by company.

trials.error: By 'sales', do you mean "confirmed sale orders (sale_order)", "invoiced revenue (account_move_line)", "point-of-sale receipts (pos_order)"? Please clarify so I can route the query to the right special

trials.pred_sql:
WITH sales_by_company AS (
  SELECT
    c.id,
    c.name,
    EXTRACT(YEAR FROM so.create_date) AS year,
    SUM(so.amount_total) AS total_sales
  FROM sale_order so
  JOIN res_company c ON so.company_id = c.id
  WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM so.create_date) = EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE)
  GROUP BY c.id, c.name, EXTRACT(YEAR FROM so.create_date)
)
SELECT
  id,
  name,
  year,
  total_sales
FROM sales_by_company
ORDER BY total_sales DESC;

nl: Show on-hand quantity by warehouse and product category.

trials.pred_sql:
SELECT w.name AS warehouse, pt.name->>'en_US' AS product, COALESCE(SUM(sq.quantity), 0) AS on_hand_quantity
FROM stock_warehouse w
JOIN stock_location l ON l.warehouse_id = w.id AND l.usage = 'internal'
JOIN stock_quant sq ON sq.location_id = l.id
JOIN product_product pp ON pp.id = sq.product_id
JOIN product_template pt ON pt.id = pp.product_tmpl_id
GROUP BY w.id, w.name, pt.id, pt.name
ORDER BY w.name, pt.name;

WITH warehouse_locations AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    warehouse_id,
    location_id
  FROM stock_move
  WHERE warehouse_id IS NOT NULL
),
product_categories AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    product_id,
    product_category_name
  FROM stock_move_line
  WHERE product_category_name IS NOT NULL
),
on_hand_by_location AS (
  SELECT
    sq.location_id,
    sq.product_id,
    SUM(sq.quantity - sq.reserved_quantity) AS on_hand_qty
  FROM stock_quant sq
  WHERE sq.quantity > sq.reserved_quantity
  GROUP BY sq.location_id, sq.product_id
)
SELECT
  wl.warehouse_id,
  pc.product_category_name,
  SUM(obl.on_hand_qty) AS on_hand_quantity
FROM warehouse_locations wl
JOIN on_hand_by_location obl ON wl.location_id = obl.location_id
JOIN product_categories pc ON obl.product_id = pc.product_id
GROUP BY wl.warehouse_id, pc.product_category_name
ORDER BY wl.warehouse_id, pc.product_category_name;

nl: What is the average order value this quarter?

trials.pred_sql:
SELECT AVG(so.amount_total) AS average_order_value
FROM sale_order so
WHERE so.state IN ('sale', 'done')
  AND so.date_order >= DATE '2026-04-01'
  AND so.date_order < DATE '2026-07-01';

SELECT AVG(total_value) as average_order_value
FROM (
  SELECT order_id, SUM(price_subtotal) as total_value
  FROM sale_order_line
  WHERE DATE_TRUNC('quarter', CURRENT_DATE) = DATE_TRUNC('quarter', create_date)
  GROUP BY order_id
) quarterly_orders;

nl: Show how many sale orders this month have not yet shipped.

trials.pred_sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) as unshipped_orders_this_month
FROM sale_order
WHERE DATE_TRUNC('month', create_date) = DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE)
AND state NOT IN ('done', 'shipped', 'delivered');

nl: Compute total invoiced revenue converted to company currency.

trials.pred_sql:
SELECT SUM(am.amount_total_signed) AS total_invoiced_revenue
FROM account_move am
WHERE am.move_type = 'out_invoice'
  AND am.state = 'posted';

WITH invoice_lines AS (
  SELECT 
    aml.company_id,
    aml.company_currency_id,
    aml.currency_id,
    aml.balance,
    aml.amount_currency
  FROM account_move_line aml
  INNER JOIN account_move am ON aml.move_id = am.id
  WHERE am.move_type IN ('out_invoice', 'out_refund')
    AND am.state = 'posted'
)
SELECT 
  SUM(balance) AS total_invoiced_revenue
FROM invoice_lines;

nl: Show landed inventory value: stock valuation plus average procurement cost.

trials.error: By 'cost', do you mean "product cost (product_template.standard_price)", "landed cost (product + shipping + customs)", "cost of goods sold (account_move_line)"? Please clarify so I can route the query

trials.pred_sql:
SELECT 
  svl.product_id,
  svl.company_id,
  SUM(svl.value) as stock_valuation_value,
  AVG(sm.price_unit) as average_procurement_cost,
  SUM(svl.value) + (SUM(svl.quantity) * AVG(sm.price_unit)) as landed_inventory_value
FROM stock_valuation_layer svl
LEFT JOIN stock_move sm ON svl.stock_move_id = sm.id
GROUP BY svl.product_id, svl.company_id;

nl: Show sales, fulfilment time, and gross margin by product this year.

trials.error: By 'sales', do you mean "confirmed sale orders (sale_order)", "invoiced revenue (account_move_line)", "point-of-sale receipts (pos_order)"? Please clarify so I can route the query to the right special

trials.pred_sql:
SELECT 
  pt.id,
  pt.default_code,
  pt.name->>'en_US' as product_name,
  COUNT(DISTINCT am.id) as sales_count,
  COALESCE(SUM(am.amount_total), 0) as total_sales,
  NULL::numeric as fulfillment_time_days,
  NULL::numeric as gross_margin_percent
FROM product_template pt
LEFT JOIN account_move am ON am.id IN (
  SELECT am2.id FROM account_move am2 
  WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM am2.create_date) = EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE)
)
WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM COALESCE(am.create_date, CURRENT_DATE)) = EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE)
GROUP BY pt.id, pt.default_code, pt.name
ORDER BY total_sales DESC;

nl: Show stock turn ratio (units sold YTD / average on-hand) by product.

trials.pred_sql: SELECT pt.id, pt.name->>'en_US' AS product, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN sm.state = 'done' AND sm.location_dest_id IN (SELECT id FROM stock_location WHERE usage = 'customer') THEN sm.product_qty ELSE 0 END), 0) AS units_sold_ytd, COALESCE(AVG(sq.quantity), 0) AS avg_on_hand, CASE WHEN COALESCE(AVG(sq.quantity), 0) > 0 THEN COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN sm.state = 'done' AND sm.location_dest_id IN (SELECT id FROM stock_location WHERE usage = 'customer') THEN sm.product_qty ELSE 0 END), 0) / COALESCE(AVG(sq.quantity), 0) ELSE 0 END AS stock_turn_ratio FROM product_template pt LEFT JOIN product_product pp ON pp.product_tmpl_id = pt.id LEFT JOIN stock_move sm ON sm.product_id = pp.id AND sm.date >= DATE '2026-01-01' AND sm.date < DATE '2026-05-28' LEFT JOIN stock_quant sq ON sq.product_id = pp.id GROUP BY pt.id, pt.name ORDER BY pt.id;

WITH ytd_sales AS (
  SELECT 
    product_tmpl_id,
    SUM(new_quantity) as units_sold_ytd
  FROM stock_change_product_qty
  WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM create_date) = EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE)
    AND new_quantity < 0
  GROUP BY product_tmpl_id
),
avg_on_hand AS (
  SELECT 
    product_tmpl_id,
    AVG(new_quantity) as avg_quantity_on_hand
  FROM stock_change_product_qty
  WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM create_date) = EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE)
  GROUP BY product_tmpl_id
)
SELECT 
  pt.id,
  pt.default_code,
  pt.name,
  COALESCE(ABS(ys.units_sold_ytd), 0) as units_sold_ytd,
  COALESCE(ah.avg_quantity_on_hand, 0) as avg_on_hand,
  CASE 
    WHEN COALESCE(ah.avg_quantity_on_hand, 0) = 0 THEN NULL
    ELSE COALESCE(ABS(ys.units_sold_ytd), 0) / COALESCE(ah.avg_quantity_on_hand, 0)
  END as stock_turn_ratio
FROM product_template pt
LEFT JOIN ytd_sales ys ON pt.id = ys.product_tmpl_id
LEFT JOIN avg_on_hand ah ON pt.id = ah.product_tmpl_id
ORDER BY stock_turn_ratio DESC NULLS LAST;

nl: Show total spend per supplier with their company breakdown.

trials.pred_sql:
SELECT 
  rp.id,
  rp.name AS supplier_name,
  am.company_id,
  SUM(COALESCE(pol.product_qty * pol.price_unit * (1 - pol.discount / 100), 0)) AS total_spend
FROM purchase_order_line pol
JOIN account_move am ON pol.order_id = am.id
JOIN res_partner rp ON pol.partner_id = rp.id
GROUP BY rp.id, rp.name, am.company_id
ORDER BY rp.name, am.company_id;

nl: Identify products at risk of stock-out (on-hand below average monthly demand).

trials.pred_sql:
WITH monthly_demand AS (
  SELECT 
    product_id,
    COUNT(*) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT DATE_TRUNC('month', create_date)), 0) AS avg_monthly_demand
  FROM stock_move
  WHERE state = 'done'
    AND create_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '12 months'
  GROUP BY product_id
),
current_stock AS (
  SELECT 
    product_id,
    location_id,
    SUM(quantity) AS on_hand
  FROM stock_move
  WHERE state = 'done'
  GROUP BY product_id, location_id
)
SELECT DISTINCT
  cs.product_id,
  cs.location_id,
  sl.name AS location_name,
  cs.on_hand,
  ROUND(md.avg_monthly_demand::numeric, 2) AS avg_monthly_demand
FROM current_stock cs
JOIN monthly_demand md ON cs.product_id = md.product_id
JOIN stock_location sl ON cs.location_id = sl.id
WHERE cs.on_hand < md.avg_monthly_demand
  AND md.avg_monthly_demand > 0
ORDER BY cs.product_id, cs.on_hand;

nl: Project this year's revenue by extrapolating the current monthly average to a full year.

trials.pred_sql: SELECT SUM(aml.credit - aml.debit) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT DATE_TRUNC('month', am.date)), 0) AS monthly_average_revenue FROM account_move_line aml JOIN account_account aa ON aa.id = aml.account_id JOIN account_move am ON am.id = aml.move_id WHERE aa.account_type = 'income' AND am.state = 'posted' AND am.date >= DATE '2026-01-01' AND am.date < DATE '2027-01-01';

WITH monthly_data AS (
  SELECT 
    DATE_TRUNC('month', date)::date AS month,
    SUM(amount) AS monthly_amount
  FROM account_analytic_line
  WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM date) = EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE)
    AND amount > 0
  GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', date)
),
average_monthly AS (
  SELECT 
    AVG(monthly_amount) AS avg_monthly_revenue
  FROM monthly_data
)
SELECT 
  avg_monthly_revenue * 12 AS projected_annual_revenue
FROM average_monthly;

nl: Find the most valuable customer segment based on order frequency and total revenue.

trials.pred_sql:
WITH customer_metrics AS (
  SELECT
    p.id,
    p.name,
    COUNT(DISTINCT so.id) AS order_count,
    SUM(COALESCE(sol.price_subtotal, 0)) AS total_revenue,
    AVG(COALESCE(sol.price_subtotal, 0)) AS avg_order_value
  FROM res_partner p
  LEFT JOIN sale_order so ON p.id = so.partner_id
  LEFT JOIN sale_order_line sol ON so.id = sol.order_id
  WHERE so.id IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY p.id, p.name
),
customer_segments AS (
  SELECT
    id,
    name,
    order_count,
    total_revenue,
    avg_order_value,
    NTILE(4) OVER (ORDER BY order_count) AS frequency_quartile,
    NTILE(4) OVER (ORDER BY total_revenue) AS revenue_quartile,
    (NTILE(4) OVER (ORDER BY order_count) + NTILE(4) OVER (ORDER BY total_revenue)) AS combined_score
  FROM customer_metrics
)
SELECT
  id,
  name,
  order_count,
  total_revenue,
  avg_order_value,
  frequency_quartile,
  revenue_quartile,
  combined_score,
  CASE
    WHEN combined_score >= 7 THEN 'High Value'
    WHEN combined_score >= 5 THEN 'Medium Value'
    ELSE 'Low Value'
  END AS segment
FROM customer_segments
ORDER BY combined_score DESC, total_revenue DESC;

nl: Which products have the longest supplier delivery times historically?

trials.error: for SELECT DISTINCT, ORDER BY expressions must appear in select list

trials.pred_sql:
SELECT 
  sm.product_id,
  AVG(EXTRACT(DAY FROM (sm.date - sm.create_date))) as avg_delivery_days,
  MAX(EXTRACT(DAY FROM (sm.date - sm.create_date))) as max_delivery_days,
  COUNT(*) as delivery_count
FROM stock_move sm
WHERE sm.date IS NOT NULL 
  AND sm.create_date IS NOT NULL
  AND sm.date > sm.create_date
  AND sm.location_id IS NOT NULL
  AND sm.location_dest_id IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY sm.product_id
ORDER BY avg_delivery_days DESC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 20;

nl: Identify products with high revenue but low inventory turn.

trials.pred_sql:
WITH product_revenue AS (
  SELECT 
    sm.product_id,
    SUM(CASE 
      WHEN sm.location_dest_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 
      ELSE 0 
    END) as move_count
  FROM stock_move sm
  WHERE sm.state = 'done'
  GROUP BY sm.product_id
),
product_inventory AS (
  SELECT 
    product_id,
    SUM(quantity) as total_quantity,
    SUM(reserved_quantity) as reserved_quantity
  FROM stock_quant
  GROUP BY product_id
)
SELECT 
  pr.product_id,
  pr.move_count as revenue_indicator,
  pi.total_quantity,
  pi.reserved_quantity,
  CASE 
    WHEN pi.total_quantity > 0 THEN pr.move_count::numeric / pi.total_quantity 
    ELSE 0 
  END as inventory_turnover_ratio
FROM product_revenue pr
LEFT JOIN product_inventory pi ON pr.product_id = pi.product_id
WHERE pr.move_count > (SELECT AVG(move_count) FROM product_revenue)
  AND pi.total_quantity > (SELECT AVG(total_quantity) FROM product_inventory WHERE total_quantity > 0)
  AND (CASE 
    WHEN pi.total_quantity > 0 THEN pr.move_count::numeric / pi.total_quantity 
    ELSE 0 
  END) < (SELECT AVG(CASE 
    WHEN pi2.total_quantity > 0 THEN pr2.move_count::numeric / pi2.total_quantity 
    ELSE 0 
  END) FROM product_revenue pr2 LEFT JOIN product_inventory pi2 ON pr2.product_id = pi2.product_id)
ORDER BY pr.move_count DESC, inventory_turnover_ratio ASC;

nl: Show total revenue this quarter.

trials.pred_sql:
SELECT SUM(aml.credit - aml.debit) AS total_revenue
FROM account_move_line aml
JOIN account_account aa ON aa.id = aml.account_id
JOIN account_move am ON am.id = aml.move_id
WHERE aa.account_type = 'income'
  AND am.state = 'posted'
  AND am.date >= DATE '2026-04-01'
  AND am.date < DATE '2026-07-01';

FROM sale_order_line sol

nl: Compare with the same quarter last year.

trials.pred_sql: SELECT 'Current Quarter' AS period, SUM(aml.credit - aml.debit) AS total_revenue FROM account_move_line aml JOIN account_account aa ON aa.id = aml.account_id JOIN account_move am ON am.id = aml.move_id WHERE aa.account_type = 'income' AND am.state = 'posted' AND am.date >= DATE '2026-01-01' AND am.date < DATE '2027-01-01' UNION ALL SELECT 'Same Quarter Last Year' AS period, SUM(aml.credit - aml.debit) AS total_revenue FROM account_move_line aml JOIN account_account aa ON aa.id = aml.account_id JOIN account_move am ON am.id = aml.move_id WHERE aa.account_type = 'income' AND am.state = 'posted' AND am.date >= DATE '2025-01-01' AND am.date < DATE '2026-01-01';

WITH payment_quarters AS (
  SELECT 
    EXTRACT(YEAR FROM ap.create_date)::integer AS year,
    EXTRACT(QUARTER FROM ap.create_date)::integer AS quarter,
    SUM(ap.amount) AS total_amount,
    COUNT(*) AS payment_count
  FROM account_payment ap
  WHERE ap.create_date IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY EXTRACT(YEAR FROM ap.create_date), EXTRACT(QUARTER FROM ap.create_date)
)
SELECT 
  pq1.year,
  pq1.quarter,
  pq1.total_amount AS current_year_amount,
  pq1.payment_count AS current_year_count,
  pq2.total_amount AS last_year_amount,
  pq2.payment_count AS last_year_count,
  ROUND((pq1.total_amount - pq2.total_amount)::numeric, 2) AS amount_difference,
  ROUND(((pq1.total_amount - pq2.total_amount) / pq2.total_amount * 100)::numeric, 2) AS percent_change
FROM payment_quarters pq1
LEFT JOIN payment_quarters pq2 
  ON pq1.quarter = pq2.quarter 
  AND pq1.year = pq2.year + 1
WHERE pq1.year = EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE)
ORDER BY pq1.quarter;

WITH yearly_revenue AS (

    sol.product_id,
    SUM(sol.price_subtotal) AS total_revenue
  FROM sale_order_line sol
  WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM sol.create_date) = EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE)
  GROUP BY sol.product_id
)
SELECT
